description: Laws and building regulations: Eurocode norms (full or partial extracts), ČSN regulations (or paid-norm stubs cross-referencing university distillations), TKP MD ČR free norms (full extracts), VL vzorové listy.

notes: B7_regulations holds extracted YAML/MD for norms. Source PDFs may live in: (a) docs/normy/tkp/ (canonical for free MD ČR TKPs), (b) B2_csn_standards/ (legacy for ČSN-like + university PDFs), (c) GCS (large-format references), or (d) NOT in repo (paid normy ÚNMZ — distillation stubs only). Each subfolder includes source_pointer.md describing PDF location and acquisition path.
